name: Spark Discharge
effect_text: Reactive. Deal 2 damage to target enemy unit.
flavor_text: A pilot's last-ditch trigger pull, born of panic, saved by instinct.

name: Scavenged Round
effect_text: Play only if one of your Drones was destroyed this turn. Deal 3 damage.
flavor_text: Pulled from the wreck still warm, still angry, still willing.

name: Pulse Rifle
effect_text: Deal 4 damage to target enemy unit.
flavor_text: Four shots in the chamber. You only need one.

name: Laser Tap
effect_text: Deal 3 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: A poke. A hint. A warning written in coherent light.

name: Kinetic Slug
effect_text: Deal 4 damage. Damage hits Hull Integrity directly.
flavor_text: Old metal, newer physics, same obvious verdict from every angle.

name: Gauss Bolt
effect_text: Priority Fire. Deal 3 damage.
flavor_text: Lighter than the slug, faster than the apology.

name: Needle Beam
effect_text: Critical Strike vs Drones. Deal 3 damage.
flavor_text: Precision is what we give the small ships in lieu of mercy.

name: Stutter Gun
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Deal 2 damage twice to target.
flavor_text: Twice is the only rhythm it knows, twice is all it needs.

name: Arc Cutter
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Deal 4 damage; adjacent enemy units take 1.
flavor_text: The arc finds the nearest thing and keeps finding.

name: Rapid Pulse
effect_text: Priority Fire. Deal 3 damage.
flavor_text: First fire wins most fights. The rest is paperwork.

name: Chaff Round
effect_text: Deal 2 damage and Disable target unit's abilities next turn.
flavor_text: Fills the sky with noise and the cockpit with silence.

name: Ion Spark
effect_text: Deal 3 damage to target subsystem. Hits Weapons Array by default.
flavor_text: Small current, wrong capacitor, ruined gun, quiet pilot on the panel.

name: Incendiary Slug
effect_text: Deal 3 damage and Radiation Leak 2 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: The first hit is the bruise. The second is the scar.

name: Scatter Round
effect_text: Hits 2 different targets for 2 damage each.
flavor_text: Aim is overrated when there's enough sky to fill.

name: Splinter Missile
effect_text: Flanking Fire. Deal 3 damage.
flavor_text: One missile. Three angles. Two wingmen to answer it.

name: Blaster Carbine
effect_text: Overclock. Deal 4 damage.
flavor_text: Runs hot. Fires hotter. The gloves were never optional.

name: Plasma Bolt
effect_text: Deal 6 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Hot enough to argue with the vacuum on its way through.

name: Ion Cannon Mk.I
effect_text: Deal 5 damage to target Weapons Array subsystem.
flavor_text: You do not shoot the ship. You shoot what the ship shoots with.

name: Fusion Lance
effect_text: Priority Fire. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: A beam so precise it asks permission before arriving.

name: Railgun Round
effect_text: Deal 6 damage. Damage is not reduced by Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Shields are for the polite. This one skipped etiquette.

name: Heavy Laser
effect_text: Deal 6 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Twice the capacitor, twice the regret on the receiving side of the glass.

name: Phase Bolt
effect_text: Phase Drive. Deal 5 damage. Only blockable by Phase Drive units.
flavor_text: It exists elsewhere until it doesn't, and you don't.

name: Arc Projector
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Deal 5 damage; adjacent enemy units take 1.
flavor_text: Current jumps sideways. So does the body count.

name: Smart Missile
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Deal 5 damage; enters ready to attack.
flavor_text: It remembers the silhouette. It remembers the name.

name: Torpedo Mk.I
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Deal 6 damage.
flavor_text: A slow breath before the whole corridor stops breathing.

name: Aim Shot
effect_text: Deal 5 damage and apply Tracking Lock to target.
flavor_text: A dot on the glass. A promise on the deck.

name: Coilgun Mk.I
effect_text: Deal 6 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Magnets the size of a fist. Results the size of a prayer.

name: Snap Fire
effect_text: Quick Strike. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: Finger on the trigger before the thought on the mind.

name: Burn Beam
effect_text: Deal 4 damage and Radiation Leak 2 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: The beam moves on. The heat does not.

name: Scattergun
effect_text: Hits up to 3 different targets for 2 damage each.
flavor_text: One shell leaves the chamber, several small regrets arrive at the target.

name: Reaction Shot
effect_text: Reactive. Deal 4 damage to a unit that just attacked.
flavor_text: You hit. They hit back. The physics were never in your favor.

name: Overclock Beam
effect_text: Overclock. Deal 5 damage.
flavor_text: Redline, then past the line. The line is just a suggestion.

name: Recoil Cannon
effect_text: Deal 6 damage. Your ship takes 1 damage.
flavor_text: The ship shakes. So do you. It was worth it.

name: Heavy Railgun
effect_text: Deal 9 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: The round leaves before the sound. The sound is for the grieving.

name: Plasma Lance
effect_text: Priority Fire. Deal 8 damage.
flavor_text: Polite in the way a surgeon is polite.

name: Fusion Cannon
effect_text: Deal 9 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Bottled a star, uncorked it on cue, served it medium rare.

name: Warhead Tube
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Deal 8 damage; excess damage hits enemy ship.
flavor_text: Whatever is left goes home with the pilot.

name: Ion Turret
effect_text: Persistent Field. Deals 3 damage to an enemy unit at end of your turn.
flavor_text: A gun that dreams of targets when no one is watching.

name: Shear Beam
effect_text: Flanking Fire. Deal 8 damage.
flavor_text: Approach from the wrong side. Find the right answer.

name: Siege Cannon
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Deal 10 damage.
flavor_text: It warms up slowly because it has thinking to do.

name: Triple Turret
effect_text: When played, fire three shots dealing 2 damage each to any targets.
flavor_text: Three barrels, three opinions, one verdict, no room for a second jury.

name: Mass Driver
effect_text: Deal 8 damage to target Engines subsystem.
flavor_text: Momentum given, momentum taken, simple trade, no receipt offered.

name: Burn Turret
effect_text: Radiation Leak. Deal 7 damage and Radiation Leak 2 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: A steady fire. The kind that outlasts introductions.

name: Smart Torpedo
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Deal 8 damage; enters ready to attack.
flavor_text: Decides it is already in love with the target.

name: Pulse Battery
effect_text: Persistent Field. Deals 2 damage to enemy ship at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Slow drumbeat. The kind that breaks long before it stops.

name: Quad Railgun
effect_text: Deal 12 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Four barrels. One conversation. Nobody finishes their sentence.

name: Torpedo Rack
effect_text: Hot Deploy. Deal 11 damage.
flavor_text: Ready on the rail before the checklist is finished.

name: Breach Cannon
effect_text: Deal 12 damage. If target had a Shield, ignore half.
flavor_text: Built for hulls that still thought they were safe.

name: Arc Cannon
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Deal 10 damage; adjacent enemy units take 2.
flavor_text: Thunder that refuses to pick a single sky.

name: Fusion Beam
effect_text: Radiation Leak. Deal 11 damage and Radiation Leak 3 for 2 turns.
flavor_text: Leaves a seam across the hull and a regret across the pilot.

name: Siege Turret
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Persistent Field: deals 4 damage to an enemy unit each turn.
flavor_text: Sets its feet deliberately, then refuses to move for the rest of the war.

name: Pulse Battery Mk.II
effect_text: Deal 14 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Twice the coil. Twice the silence on the comms afterwards.

name: Breach Torpedo
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Deal 16 damage; excess damage hits enemy ship.
flavor_text: Opens the door. Whatever is inside is on its own.

name: Ion Breaker
effect_text: Critical Strike. Deal 12 damage to target Reactor Core subsystem.
flavor_text: Aim at the heart of the ship. The ship has only one.

name: Orbital Battery
effect_text: Priority Fire. Deal 18 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Spoken from above, answered from the wreckage, filed in the historical record.

name: Scout Drone Beta
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1. Rearrange the top card of your deck.
flavor_text: Cheap eyes. They see the thing you hoped they wouldn't.

name: Light Drone
effect_text: A lightweight combat drone.
flavor_text: Flies until it does not. Simplest contract in the fleet.

name: Gun Drone
effect_text: A basic armed drone.
flavor_text: It fires when pointed. It is pointed often.

name: Spotter Drone
effect_text: End Cycle: reveal the top card of your deck.
flavor_text: A very small pair of honest eyes, watching everything no one else will.

name: Swarm Drone
effect_text: A fast attack drone.
flavor_text: Alone, it is nothing. With friends, it is a weather report.

name: Fighter Drone
effect_text: A reliable combat drone.
flavor_text: Standard loadout. Standard outcome. Standard pilot, exceptional day.

name: Interceptor Drone
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this drone first.
flavor_text: Stands between you and the bad math. Usually loses. Usually first.

name: Striker Drone
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Enters ready to attack an enemy unit.
flavor_text: The launch tube is its childhood. The enemy is its first memory.

name: Bomber Drone
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 3 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: Goes up fine, comes down louder, lands in somebody else's rear hangar.

name: Recon Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: reveal opponent's hand.
flavor_text: Before the ambush, a polite question about the guest list.

name: Decoy Drone
effect_text: Enemy ships must target this before your other drones this turn.
flavor_text: Made to look like something worth killing. Succeeds too often.

name: Repair Drone
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Restores 2 Hull to your ship at end of each of your turns.
flavor_text: Chatter on the hull, stitching what the battle unpicked.

name: Siege Drone
effect_text: A heavy attack drone.
flavor_text: Slow climber. Fast killer. The trade is always favorable.

name: Patrol Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Back-and-forth, back-and-forth. You stop noticing. That is when it sees you.

name: Flashbang Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Apply Lock to target enemy unit.
flavor_text: Bright. Loud. Gone. You are one of those three.

name: Chain Drone
effect_text: Assault Protocol 1. +1 power when attacking.
flavor_text: Eyes on the leash, teeth off it, the pilot watching from a safe orbit.

name: Arc Drone
effect_text: Breach Cascade. When this deals damage, adjacent enemy units take 1.
flavor_text: A spark with intent. The rest catches eventually.

name: Jury-Rigged Drone
effect_text: A drone stitched together from salvage.
flavor_text: Two wings. Six owners. One bad idea that kept working.

name: Heavy Fighter
effect_text: A well-armored combat drone.
flavor_text: Slow in the climb. Swift in the finishing.

name: Interceptor Mk.II
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this drone first.
flavor_text: Second-generation steel, first-generation stubbornness, built in the same cold welding bay.

name: Assault Drone
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Enters ready to attack an enemy unit.
flavor_text: Clamps released, checklist ignored, target already acquired before the launch alarm.

name: Bomber Mk.II
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 4 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: Bigger warhead. Same temperament. Still friendly until touched.

name: Cloaked Drone
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Cannot be attacked the turn it is deployed.
flavor_text: It is already there. It was there before you looked.

name: Phase Drone
effect_text: Phase Drive. Only blockable by Phase Drive units.
flavor_text: Half here. Half elsewhere. The wrong half for you.

name: Skyward Drone
effect_text: Skyward Maneuver. Only blockable by Skyward or Tracking Array.
flavor_text: Climbs past the roof of the fight. Chooses its doorway down.

name: Oracle Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Deep Scan. Choose 1 of 3 random cards from your deck.
flavor_text: Does not predict the future. Just the relevant slice.

name: Turret Drone
effect_text: A heavy-duty combat drone.
flavor_text: Stationary in spirit, terminal in practice, never asks permission to fire.

name: Repair Drone Mk.II
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Restores 2 Hull to your ship at end of each of your turns.
flavor_text: Older chassis. Same patient work on the hull seam.

name: Sapper Drone
effect_text: When this destroys a unit, damage its ship's Engines subsystem for 2.
flavor_text: Chews the legs out from under the ship. Everything else falls in time.

name: Laser Drone
effect_text: A light-weapon combat drone.
flavor_text: Pinpoint work, pinpoint pilot, pinpoint ending, pinpoint write-up filed later.

name: Siege Drone Mk.II
effect_text: A reinforced heavy combat drone.
flavor_text: Twice the plating. Twice the appetite for slow work.

name: Flanker Drone
effect_text: Flanking Fire. Must be blocked by 2 or more units.
flavor_text: Whatever side you thought it was coming from, it was the other one.

name: Scanner Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: apply Tracking Lock to target enemy unit.
flavor_text: The dot does not leave. The ship does, eventually.

name: Heavy Bomber Drone
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Enters ready to attack an enemy unit.
flavor_text: Drops heavy ordnance, never apologizes, rarely remembers where it left the pieces.

name: Bulwark Drone
effect_text: Interceptor. Enemy must attack this drone first.
flavor_text: Thickest plates the fleet could weld. Thickest stubbornness pilot could hire.

name: Strike Drone Mk.III
effect_text: Priority Fire. Resolves damage before opponent this turn.
flavor_text: Third iteration, fourth widow, metrics improving on every operator summary sheet.

name: Bomber Mk.III
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 4 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: Dies well, dies loudly, dies on purpose, writes its own brief obituary.

name: Support Drone
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Restores 2 Hull to your ship at end of each of your turns.
flavor_text: Carries the spare parts, also the grudge, and the spare grudge parts.

name: Heavy Fighter Mk.II
effect_text: A well-armored heavy combat drone.
flavor_text: Stayed in the fight after the fight was sensible.

name: Kamikaze Drone
effect_text: Critical Breach: deal 6 damage to the unit that destroyed this.
flavor_text: Built knowing the end. Flies anyway. Lands anyway.

name: Cloaker Drone
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Cannot be attacked the turn it is deployed.
flavor_text: On sensors it is a shadow. On the hull it is a crater.

name: Elite Fighter
effect_text: An elite combat drone.
flavor_text: Clean chassis, cleaner record, pilot sleeps elsewhere on a very different ship.

name: Siege Bomber
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Enters ready to attack an enemy unit.
flavor_text: Long range, short temper, everyone underneath knows the exact moment afterward.

name: Heavy Interceptor
effect_text: Interceptor. Cold Boot 1. Enemy must attack this first once active.
flavor_text: Takes its time arriving. Takes longer than that leaving.

name: Capital Drone
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Cold Boot 1. Enters ready but disabled for 1 turn.
flavor_text: One of the big ones. Launches loud, lands louder.
